languages.text: {n}Раненый поворачивает к вам голову, недоверчиво глядя на вас единственным здоровым глазом. Второй скрыт под сгустками запекшейся крови и отеками, обрамляющими перечеркнувшую бровь и висок глубокую рану. Бледное лицо с резкими и тонкими чертами едва ли принадлежит простолюдину.{/n} "Изимонд Зауэрбэк. Чем обязан вниманию?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Раненый поворачивает к вам голову, недоверчиво глядя на вас единственным здоровым глазом. Второй скрыт под сгустками запекшейся крови и отеками, обрамляющими перечеркнувшую бровь и висок глубокую рану. Бледное лицо с резкими и тонкими чертами едва ли принадлежит простолюдину.{/n} "Изимонд Зауэрбэк. Чем обязан вниманию?"
traits.speaker: IzimondSauerback

languages.text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. The other eye is buried under clotted blood and swelling, which flanks a deep gash cutting across his eyebrow and temple. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"
languages.original_text: {n}Раненый поворачивает к вам голову, недоверчиво глядя на вас единственным здоровым глазом. Второй скрыт под сгустками запекшейся крови и отеками, обрамляющими перечеркнувшую бровь и висок глубокую рану. languages.text: {n}El hombre herido gira la cabeza hacia ti, observándote con incredulidad con su ojo bueno. El otro está oculto bajo la sangre coagulada y la hinchazón que rodean a una laceración profunda desde su ceja a su sien. Su rostro pálido, con facciones afiladas y delicadas, no puede pertenecer a un plebeyo.{/n} «Isimond Sauerback. ¿A qué debo este placer?».
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre herido gira la cabeza hacia ti, observándote con incredulidad con su ojo bueno. El otro está oculto bajo la sangre coagulada y la hinchazón que rodean a una laceración profunda desde su ceja a su sien. Su rostro pálido, con facciones afiladas y delicadas, no puede pertenecer a un plebeyo.{/n} «Isimond Sauerback. ¿A qué debo este placer?».

languages.text: {n}受伤的男人转过头，用仅剩的一只好眼难以置信地盯着你。他另一只眼睛深埋在凝结的血块和肿胀之下，旁边还留着一道横贯眉骨和太阳穴的深深创口。他苍白的脸上有着精致且分明的五官，那绝不可能是张平民的脸。{/n}“我是伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。请问您有何贵干？”
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. The other eye is buried under clotted blood and swelling, which flanks a deep gash cutting across his eyebrow and temple. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"

traits.locale_text: {n}受伤的男人转过头，用仅剩的一只好眼难以置信地盯着你。他另一只眼睛深埋在凝结的血块和肿胀之下，旁边还留着一道横贯眉骨和太阳穴的深深创口。他苍白的脸上有着精致且分明的五官，那绝不可能是张平民的脸。{/n}“我是伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。请问您有何贵干？”

languages.text: {n}L'homme blessé tourne la tête vers vous et vous adresse un regard incrédule de son unique œil valide. L'autre est enfoui sous une épaisse couche de sang et de chairs tuméfiées bordant une profonde entaille qui court de son sourcil à sa tempe. Avec ses traits délicats et bien dessinés, son visage pâle témoigne d'une haute extraction.{/n} « Isimond Sauerback. Que me vaut ce plaisir ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. The other eye is buried under clotted blood and swelling, which flanks a deep gash cutting across his eyebrow and temple. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"

languages.text: {n}Yaralı adam başını sana çeviriyor, sağlam olan tek gözüyle sana inanmazlık içinde bakıyor. Diğer gözü pıhtılaşmış kan ve şişliğin altına gömülmüş. Bu şişlik, kaşı ve şakağı boyunca uzanan derin bir kesiği çevreliyor. Keskin ve narin hatlara sahip bu solgun yüzün sıradan birine ait olması imkânsız.{/n} "İsimond Sauerback. Bu zevki neye borçluyum?"
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. languages.text: {n}Der verwundete Mann dreht seinen Kopf zu dir und starrt dich mit seinem unversehrten Auge ungläubig an. Das andere Auge ist geschwollen und blutverkrustet. Von seiner Augenbraue zieht sich ein tiefer Schnitt bis zur Schläfe. Sein blasses Gesicht mit den scharfen und sanften Zügen kann unmöglich das Gesicht eines gewöhnlichen Menschen sein.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. Was verschafft mir das Vergnügen?"
languages.original_text: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. The other eye is buried under clotted blood and swelling, which flanks a deep gash cutting across his eyebrow and temple. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"

Sein blasses Gesicht mit den scharfen und sanften Zügen kann unmöglich das Gesicht eines gewöhnlichen Menschen sein.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. Was verschafft mir das Vergnügen?"

languages.text: {n}傷ついた男は頭を向け、あなたを見つめた。彼の良い目からは信じられないような表情が浮かんでいた。もう片方の目は血と腫れで覆われ、眉と側頭部を横切る深い傷跡が浮かんでいた。彼の顔は蒼白で、鋭く繊細な特徴が浮かんでいた。こんな顔は平民にはありえない。{/n}「イシモンド・ザウアーバック。お会いできて光栄です」
